auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Route4Me API key passed as the api_key query parameter.

actions.name: create_optimization
actions.description: Create a Route4Me optimization problem from parameters and destination addresses.

parameters.description: The optimization parameters object accepted by Route4Me.

address.description: The destination address or label accepted by Route4Me.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a Route4Me optimization problem.

anyOf.description: The Route4Me optimization state when present.

routeIds.description: The route IDs returned inside the optimization response.

routeCount.description: The number of routes included in the optimization response.

addressCount.description: The number of addresses included in the optimization response.

raw.description: The raw optimization object returned by Route4Me.

actions.name: delete_optimizations
actions.description: Delete one or more Route4Me optimization problems by ID.

optimizationProblemIds.description: The optimization problem IDs to delete.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting Route4Me optimization problems.

status.description: Whether Route4Me reported a successful deletion.

removed.description: The number of optimization problems removed by Route4Me.

raw.description: The raw deletion response returned by Route4Me.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Route4Me optimization deletion response.

actions.name: list_optimizations
actions.description: List Route4Me optimization problems, or fetch one optimization by its ID.

optimizationProblemId.description: The optimization problem ID to fetch directly.

state.description: The optimization state filter documented by Route4Me.

limit.description: The maximum number of optimization problems to return.

offset.description: The result offset used for pagination.

startDate.description: An ISO date string in YYYY-MM-DD format.

endDate.description: An ISO date string in YYYY-MM-DD format.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Route4Me optimization problems.

anyOf.description: The Route4Me optimization state when present.

routeIds.description: The route IDs returned inside the optimization response.

routeCount.description: The number of routes included in the optimization response.

addressCount.description: The number of addresses included in the optimization response.

raw.description: The raw optimization object returned by Route4Me.

optimizations.description: The optimization summaries returned by Route4Me.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Route4Me optimization list response.
